title: SecurityCraft x Create
description: Resource pack to change Security Craft textures in order to match Create ones.
body:
Resource pack made for improving cohesion between [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Security Craft](https://modrinth.com/mod/security-craft).

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/921158bd1749aac7c288106b3b6377cd8919ace1.png)
